rules.name: Always check for warnings after edits
rules.description: Use get_errors tool after every file edit

rules.name: Fix all warnings before completing tasks
rules.description: Never leave unresolved warnings in the codebase

rules.name: Preserve content
rules.description: Never remove content unless explicitly instructed

rules.name: Report unfixable warnings
rules.description: If a warning cannot be fixed, explain it clearly

rules.name: No duplicate content
rules.description: Never leave duplicate sections in documentation

rules.name: Language specifiers
rules.description: Always use correct language specifiers in code blocks
